tagline: Localize repo ea hau ho boitlamo bo bong le bo bong.

hero.title: Hello Hello
hero.lede: Leqephe lena le fetoleloa ke Resource Translator ka boeona, ka ho sutumelletsa ho ea holimo, puong e 'ngoe le e' ngoe eo Azure AI Translator e e tšehetsang.

phrases.welcome: Rea u amohela ho mofetoleli oa lisebelisoa.
phrases.machine_translated: E fetoletsoeng ka mochini ke mofetoleli oa Azure AI.
phrases.open_pull_request: Bula kopo ea ho hula ka liphetolelo tse ncha.
phrases.ship_anywhere: Tsamaisa software ea hau kae kapa kae lefatšeng.
phrases.thank_you: Kea le leboha ka ho leka mofetoleli oa lisebelisoa.

features.reliable: Tobetsa konopo e 'ngoe le e' ngoe ea lifaele tsa hau tsa mohloli.
features.configurable: Molumo, indasteri, glossary, lipolelo tse nyefolang — kaofela li ka hlophisoa.
features.ci_native: E etselitsoe liketso tsa GitHub le li-workflows tsa ho hula.

footer.powered_by: E tsamaisoa ke mofetoleli oa lisebelisoa le mofetoleli oa Azure AI.
footer.view_translation_pr: Sheba kopo ea morao-rao ea phetolelo.
